race.description: Winter Blues At The Races 24th July Mdn Plate
race.comment: REIGN CAPITAL (4) found the line nicely last start when runner-up over 1400m at Werribee. Backmarker who gets home hard. Progressive type who strips fitter and is a leading chance. TUXEDO MISS (13) did her best work late and finished 2.5 lengths from the winner in fourth last start over 1107m at Kilmore. Close to a win and gets her chance. WHO'S WHO (6) is a gelding by North Pacific from Zoofari on debut. Showing ability in the trials and should hit the ground running. STREET SMART BOY (14) is a first starter by Satono Aladdin out of Initiative. Well educated with a host of jump-outs and trials so watch the market closely. Stable are very good at presenting them ready to fire.
